finding: Stage 08 ablation variant degeneracy at T<=64

A_calibration_dead_branch.evidence: max |u_full - u_nocalib| = 0.0 (before fix). _run_episode called solve_mode_a with hardcoded kappa_hat=0.65; solve_mode_a does not read k_calib or R_brier_max from config. hdr_no_calib variant config keys were silently ignored.
A_calibration_dead_branch.fix_applied: kappa_hat now computed per-step via _get_kappa_hat() using compute_p_A_robust. Calibration overshoot maps to kappa reduction (tighter target). After fix: max |kappa_full - kappa_nocalib| = 0.011250.

B_coherence_zero_at_kappa_mid.evidence: coupling_scale = 0.00000000 at kappa_hat=0.65 (midpoint of [0.55, 0.75]). Both g_pen and g_grad are exactly 0.0 inside the target band. Outside band (kappa=0.30): coupling_scale = 0.08062500.
B_coherence_zero_at_kappa_mid.fix_applied: kappa_hat follows _kappa_schedule starting at kappa_lo - 0.15 = 0.40 (below target), ramping to kappa_hi over first 2/3 of episode. After fix: 28% of steps have active coherence coupling at T=32.

C_tau_tilde_temporal_confound.evidence: Inversion at T=32 (diff=-0.0017) and T=64 (diff=-0.0010); resolves at T=128 (diff=+0.0004). w_tau = w2/(1-rho^2) = 0.5/(1-0.96^2) = 6.41 adds large Q_eff diagonal penalising recovery attempts. At short T, insufficient steps to realise escape benefit.
C_tau_tilde_temporal_confound.note: Resolves at T>=128; production run T=256 expected to show correct ordering.

actions_taken: Added _get_kappa_hat() to _run_episode for ICI-aware calibration differentiation
Added _kappa_schedule() for time-varying kappa_hat reflecting maladaptive episode dynamics
Added per-step diagnostic counters (coherence_steps_active, coupling_scale, kappa_hat, u norms)
Added ablation_criterion_met and ablation_criterion_note to JSON output
Added results_are_valid=False gate when criterion fails at T>=128
Added 3 new pytest tests: criterion noted, tag check, production skip
manuscript_table_3_status: BLOCKED - do not use fast-mode data for Table 3
